sections.title: Critical: Per-Class Stats in `src/app/api/admin/stats/route.ts:64-73`
5× Array Filter in `src/app/api/admin/stats/route.ts:45-49`
Double Sort in `AttendanceForm.tsx` Renders
All 22 API Routes Use `force-dynamic`
Redundant Session Fetch in `Header.tsx:27`
sections.content:
```typescript
useEffect(() => { fetchSession(); }, [pathname]);
```

On every page navigation, the header re-fetches `/api/auth/session` — a roundtrip just to re-read what the cookie already says. The session cookie is `session_token` and the client already had it.

**Fix**: Call `fetchSession()` once on mount, not on every pathname change:

```typescript
useEffect(() => { fetchSession(); }, []);  // only on mount
```

Or better, store `{nama, role}` in a non-httpOnly cookie alongside the session token so the client reads it instantly.

---

sections.title: Unnecessary Sequential API Calls in `src/app/page.tsx:24-35`
Button Definitions Re-created Every Render in `AttendanceForm.tsx`
sections.content:
`btnRow()` and `btnRowMobile()` define 5 button config objects inside the function body on every render, then map over them. These arrays are static — they never change.

**Fix**: Hoist the button config arrays outside the component (or use `useMemo`) so they're created once.

---

sections.title: Growing Login Rate-Limiter Map in `src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts:7`

| 🟡 | `fetchSession` on pathname change | `Header.tsx:27` | 2min |
| 🟢 | Base64 preview → objectURL | `AttendanceForm.tsx:66` | 10min |
| 🟢 | Rate-limiter periodic cleanup | `login/route.ts` | 5min |
